channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Bruce Springsteen, Bon Jovi and Public Enemy Deliver Star-Studded Music America Concert
item.description: 🎸 Rock legends unite in the ultimate musical extravaganza! 🌟 Don't miss this epic collab! 🎶 #MusicAmericaConcert

item.title: Duffy Announces Surprise Return With First Live Concert in 15 Years
item.description: 🎉 Duffy is back and better than ever! 🎤 Don't miss her epic comeback concert after 15 years! 🔥 #DuffyIsBack

item.title: Morgan Wallen Criticized for Canceling Pittsburgh Show After Severe Weather Fails to Materialize
item.description: Looks like Mother Nature decided to DJ for Morgan Wallen in Pittsburgh 🌧️🎶 #WeatherFail #MusicNews

item.title: The Cure Break Out Live Rarities At Primavera Sound 2026
item.description: 🎸 Legendary vibes alert! The Cure bringing rare gems to Primavera Sound 2026! Who's ready to dance like it's the '80s? 🔥 #TheCure #PrimaveraSound

item.title: Madonna Premieres Surrealistic, NSFW ‘Confessions II’ Short Film at Tribeca: ‘It’s About Connection’
item.description: Madonna brings the 🔥 with new 'Confessions II' film at Tribeca! 💃✨ Embrace the surreal and let the music vibe flow! 🎶 #Madonna #ConfessionsII

item.title: Tucker Wetmore Brings an Effervescent Energy to Billboard Country Live’s Night Two
item.description: 🌟 Country music is about to get a serious dose of energy thanks to Tucker Wetmore! 🤠🎶 #BillboardCountryLive #TuckerWetmore

item.title: ‘Don’t Look for Me, I’m Gone’: Lorde Premieres Unreleased Song, Puts Personal Spin on ‘Girl, So Confusing’ & More at Gov Ball 2026
item.description: 🎶🔥 Lorde takes us on a journey with new tracks at Gov Ball 2026! 💃 #Lorde #GovBall2026 #NewMusicAlert 🎤

item.title: The Black Crowes’ Chris Robinson Addresses Backlash Over Onstage Comments
item.description: 🌟 Rock on! 🎸 Chris Robinson of The Black Crowes opens up about recent controversy in the spotlight. 🎤 #MusicNews #RockNRollTrueConfessions

item.title: Jessie Is the Star of Taylor Swift’s Deeply Nostalgic ‘Toy Story’ Music Video
item.description: 🌟 Jessie steals the show in Taylor Swift's nostalgic 'Toy Story' music video! 🚀🎶 #Swifties #JessieJams

item.title: Laura Marling Drops Surprise Raffi Covers Album
item.description: 🎶 Laura Marling puts a playful spin on classics with her surprise Raffi covers album! Who else is ready for some musical nostalgia? 🌟 #LauraMarling #RaffiCovers

item.title: 9 New Songs Out Today
item.description: 🎶 Fresh beats dropping today! Get your headphones ready for these new jams! 🎧💃 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Tasha – “Quick!”
item.description: 🚨 Just in time for your weekend vibes! 🎶 Check out Tasha's new track "Quick" now 💥 #NewMusicFriday #MusicDiscovery

item.title: Unreleased Prince songs from across his career collected for new album ‘Timeless’
item.description: 🎵 Dive into the vault with Prince's 'Timeless' album showcasing rare gems from his legendary catalog! 💎 #Prince #NewMusicAlert 🎸✨

item.title: Pixies Announce Bossanova & Trompe Le Monde Reissues With Previously Unreleased Tracks
item.description: 🚀 Pixies are bringing back the good stuff! 🎸 Get ready to rock out with unreleased tracks from Bossanova & Trompe Le Monde! 🎶 #Pixies #ReissuesGalore

item.title: Emma Ruth Rundle Announces New Album These Killing Times: Hear “Powerless”
item.description: 🔥 Emma Ruth Rundle is back! 🎶 Listen to her powerful new track “Powerless” off her upcoming album These Killing Times! 🚀 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: American Football Announce 2026 Fall US Tour
item.description: 🏈🎸 Get ready to kick off the ultimate touchdown tour with @americfootball this fall! Which city will you catch them in? #AmericanFootballTour2026

item.title: Disney World Has Officially Replaced Aerosmith With Muppets Covering Blur
item.description: 🎸🐸 Rock out with the Muppets at Disney World! Say goodbye to Aerosmith and hello to some fuzzy, fabulous fun! 🎶✨ #MuppetsTakeDisney

item.title: Tierra Whack Announces New Mixtape (Whack’s Museum)
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to dive into Whack’s Museum! 🎤 Tierra Whack is dropping a new mixtape that's sure to be a masterpiece! 🎨 #TierraWhack #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Weezer Announce New (Gold) Album: Hear “We Might As Well Be Strangers” (Feat. Wednesday)
item.description: 🎉 Ready to rock out? Weezer drops news of a shiny new album! 🌟 Listen to "We Might As Well Be Strangers" ft. Wednesday now! 🎶 #WeezerGoldAlbum 🤘

item.title: Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy Set Co-Headlining Tour
item.description: 🚀 Double the indie rock magic! Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy teaming up for a tour. Who's joining the party? 🎸🎶 #IndieRockDreamTeam

item.title: Taylor Swift Shows Love for Paul McCartney’s New Album: ‘Never Not Inspired’
item.description: When legends support legends 🌟🎶 Taylor Swift vibing to Paul McCartney's new tunes! #MusicLegends #InspirationGalore

item.title: Tour news: CRSSD Fest, Revocation, Lauryn Hill, Jeff Goldblum, Wilco, more
item.description: 🎵 Exciting tour announcements coming in hot! CRSSD Fest, Lauryn Hill, Jeff Goldblum, and more hitting the road! 🚀 #LiveMusic #TourNews

item.title: Meg Stalter Loves All Gays in Her New Single “Gay”
item.description: 🏳️‍🌈 Let's dance to @megstalter's anthem of love! 🎶💖 #MegStalter #NewMusicAlert #LoveIsLove

item.title: Death Cab For Cutie Share “Stone Over Water,” Rock “Riptides” On Kimmel
item.description: Death Cab For Cutie is bringing those rockin' vibes to Kimmel! 🎸🌊 Who's tuning in for some killer tunes tonight? #DeathCabForCutie #LateNightJams

item.title: Belle and Sebastian Made a Scottish World Cup Anthem
item.description: 🏴⚽️ Let's cheer on the team with Belle and Sebastian's catchy new anthem! #Scotland #MusicNews

item.title: Tierra Whack to Open New (Whack’s Museum) Mixtape on Juneteenth
item.description: 🎶 Kick off your Juneteenth celebrations with Tierra Whack's museum-themed mixtape! 🎉 Let's groove to her incredible creativity! ✨ #TierraWhack #JuneteenthJams

item.title: Riley Green Announces 2026 Fall “Cowboy As It Gets Tour” Dates
item.description: 🤠 Saddle up, y'all! Riley Green is hitting the road on his "Cowboy As It Gets Tour" this fall! Who's ready to two-step? 🎶 #RileyGreen #CountryMusic

item.title: Classic Episodes of Mister Rogers’ Neighborhood to Be Uploaded to Official YouTube Channel
item.description: 🎶 Let's take a trip down memory lane with classic episodes of Mister Rogers' Neighborhood on YouTube! 🚋✨ #ThrowbackThursday #MisterRogersNeighborhood

item.title: They Might Be Giants played “Exquisite Dead Guy” for the first time in over 25 years in NYC (pics, video, setlist)
item.description: 🎉🎶 Giants among us! They Might Be Giants rocked NYC with a blast from the past - "Exquisite Dead Guy" after 25 years! Check out the pics and setlist! 🤘 #musicnews #TMBG

item.title: Julia Jacklin Signs To 4AD, Announces Extensive Tour
item.description: 🎶 Exciting news! Julia Jacklin joins the 4AD fam and hits the road with a massive tour! Who's ready for some live music magic? 🌟 #JuliaJacklin #MusicNews
